title: urceola brachysepala
intro: Urceola brachysepala, also known as the short-petaled Urceola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Urceola brachysepala include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Urceola brachysepala often involve decoctions or infusions of its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments.
